que era pedro alves cabral: Três Graças is a Brazilian telenovela created by Aguinaldo Silva, Virgílio Silva and Zé Dassilva. It premiered on TV Globo on 20 October 2025. The telenovela stars Sophie Charlotte, Dira Paes, Alana Cabral, Grazi Massafera, Murilo Benício, Romulo Estrela, Arlete Salles and Marcos Palmeira.
